title: Chilita zephyranthoides

It is native to South America and is closely related to the genus Siphonostela. Chilita zephyranthoides is a type of flowering plant with a specific classification in the botanical hierarchy. Within this order, Chilita zephyranthoides shares characteristics with other species of similar families and genera.
